metadata.title: Generate a visual prompt for a healthcare administration software build in South Asia, using the memory_lens to incorporate historical context and user memory patterns, with explicit validation gates to ensure governance and compliance.

mission.primary_objective: Generate a visual prompt for a healthcare administration software build in South Asia, using the memory_lens to incorporate historical context and user memory patterns, with explicit validation gates to ensure governance and compliance.
mission.success_definition: The visual prompt is SR8-compilable into a structured directive with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract.; All validation gates are explicitly defined and passable.; The memory_lens integration is demonstrable (e.g., shows how past errors inform current design).; The output can be directly used by Codex to generate a software build specification.

in_scope.item: The prompt must produce a visual representation (e.g., UI mockup, system architecture diagram, or workflow illustration) of a healthcare admin software module. It must include elements for patient record management, appointment scheduling, billing, and local regulatory compliance (e.g., data privacy laws). The memory_lens should reflect past user interactions, error patterns, and optimization suggestions from similar deployments.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: The visual prompt is SR8-compilable into a structured directive with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All validation gates are explicitly defined and passable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: The memory_lens integration is demonstrable (e.g., shows how past errors inform current design).

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: The output can be directly used by Codex to generate a software build specification.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.visual_objective: Generate a visual prompt for a healthcare administration software build in South Asia, using the memory_lens to incorporate historical context and user memory patterns, with explicit validation gates to ensure governance and compliance.
SRXML_Artifact.subject: The prompt must produce a visual representation (e.g., UI mockup, system architecture diagram, or workflow illustration) of a healthcare admin software module. It must include elements for patient record management, appointment scheduling, billing, and local regulatory compliance (e.g., data privacy laws). The memory_lens should reflect past user interactions, error patterns, and optimization suggestions from similar deployments.

quality_gates.item: The visual prompt is SR8-compilable into a structured directive with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract.
All validation gates are explicitly defined and passable.
The memory_lens integration is demonstrable (e.g., shows how past errors inform current design).
The output can be directly used by Codex to generate a software build specification.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
